scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api,worker,flower -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm dev:web" "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:worker" "pnpm dev:flower"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn chatbot_api.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/api && uv run celery -A chatbot_api.core.celery_app worker --pool=solo --loglevel=info
scripts.dev:flower: cd apps/api && uv run celery -A chatbot_api.core.celery_app flower --port=5555 --address=127.0.0.1
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy
